title: Avocodo
description:
I have created to make it easier to start a server and it's more of a vanilla plus, so I added 3D textures along with a shader that I like.
 I do not own any of the mods nor make them my self, All credit is do to there original creators.
body:
I have created to make it easier to start a server and it's more of a vanilla plus, so I added 3D textures along with a shader that I like. This is more of a vanilla plus server with proximity chat and controller's support. I also added a few different optimization mods to help both ther server and client,( Some mods maybe redundant). 
 I do not own any of the mods nor make them my self, All credit is do to there original creators.
